title: The Century Report: March 31, 2026
description:
Microsoft paired GPT and Claude in adversarial sequence to produce research that outperformed every solo model by 14 points on a standardized benchmark, three-quarters of Americans reported distrusting AI-generated information while adopting it at record rates, California imposed AI procurement standards in direct defiance of federal deregulation, and semi-solid-state batteries expanded from passenger EVs into commercial trucks and flying aircraft within months.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-31-2026/

Microsoft's Copilot Researcher update introduced multi-model workflows where GPT drafts research and Claude reviews it for factual accuracy, scoring 57.4 on the DRACO benchmark against Claude's solo 42.7 - a 14-point lead that suggests the future of AI reliability lives in coordination architecture rather than individual model quality. A Quinnipiac poll captured the sharpest adoption-trust paradox yet: 73% of Americans use AI regularly while 76% distrust the results, with Gen Z reporting both the highest fluency and the deepest labor pessimism at 81% expecting fewer jobs. California responded by signing an executive order imposing procurement standards on AI companies seeking state contracts, directly defying federal calls for lighter oversight and joining over 100 state-level AI laws already passed. CALB achieved mass production of semi-solid-state batteries at 400 Wh/kg for commercial trucks and 350 Wh/kg for XPeng's eVTOL aircraft, cascading the technology across vehicle categories within months of its first passenger EV deployment. Mistral AI raised $830 million in debt for a Paris-area data center targeting Q2 operations, while Rebellions raised $400 million for inference-focused chips at a $2.3 billion valuation. KAIST researchers published a catalyst system that produces pharmaceutical-grade amines from sunlight and air alone, with automatic self-regeneration that bypasses the fundamental efficiency-reusability tradeoff in conventional catalysis.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-31-2026/
